name: cmux-cli
description: Control cmux (terminal multiplexer / workspace manager) from the command line. Manage windows, workspaces, panes, surfaces, and tabs; send keystrokes; read screen output; split panes; drive the embedded browser; send notifications. Triggers on mentions of cmux, workspaces, panes, surfaces, tabs, splits, or requests to send input to / read output from a cmux session.
